mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transit_cache (from_attraction_id, to_attraction_id, departure_hour, request_mode, duration_minutes, transport_mode, transfer_count, fare, total_distance_m, total_walk_m, path_detail, taxi_fare, route_coords) VALUES (#{fromAttractionId}, #{toAttractionId}, #{departureHour}, #{requestMode}, #{durationMinutes}, #{transportMode}, #{transferCount}, #{fare}, #{totalDistanceM}, #{totalWalkM}, #{pathDetail}, #{taxiFare}, #{routeCoords}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE duration_minutes = VALUES(duration_minutes), transport_mode = VALUES(transport_mode), transfer_count = VALUES(transfer_count), fare = VALUES(fare), total_distance_m = VALUES(total_distance_m), total_walk_m = VALUES(total_walk_m), path_detail = VALUES(path_detail), taxi_fare = VALUES(taxi_fare), route_coords = VALUES(route_coords), cached_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
